name: Old Fashioned Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the 3/4 cup granulated fructose, 1 cup water, and salt in a saucepan. Stir and cook until boiling.
2. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and 3/4 cup water. Mix thoroughly.
3. Slowly stir the cornstarch mixture into the boiling fructose mixture. Cook until thick and clear. Remove from heat.
4. Combine beaten egg yolks and lemon juice. Stir into the hot mixture. Return to heat and continue cooking, stirring constantly until it boils rapidly again.
5. Remove from heat; then stir in margarine and dried lemon peel. Pour into the pastry shell.
6. For the meringue: In a mixing bowl, combine egg whites and cream of tartar and beat until frothy. In a small cup, combine 2 tablespoons granulated fructose and granulated sugar replacement. Gradually add this mixture to the beaten egg whites while continuing to beat.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
